description: Qing Dynasty ancient architectural complex, showcasing immigrant culture, and exploring the historical and cultural roots of Chongqing.
Famous snack street in Chongqing, featuring authentic local delicacies such as Chongqing noodles and spicy and sour vermicelli.
A classic activity of taking a night cruise on the Yangtze River and Jialing River to admire the dazzling night views along the banks.
Iconic architectural complex of Chongqing with stilted building style, offering brilliant night views and a chance to experience the charm of the mountain city.
The best observation deck in Chongqing, providing a 360-degree panoramic view of the Yuzhong Peninsula and an excellent spot to enjoy the mountain city's night scenery.
Internet-famous spectacle of a light rail passing through a building, showcasing Chongqing's unique three-dimensional transportation landscape.
Municipal art museum in Chongqing, exhibiting contemporary art pieces, located in the core commercial area of Jiefangbei.

attraction_name: Mountain City Trail · Jianxingpo Grand Stairway
description: Chongqing's characteristic mountain city trail, offering an experience of the uphill and downhill lifestyle of the mountain city through urban hiking.
